title: Change red muted text to silver

requirements.summary: Update the --text-muted CSS custom property from red to silver in both light and dark theme modes
acceptanceCriteria: The --text-muted variable in light mode uses a silver/gray color value
The --text-muted variable in dark mode uses a silver/gray color value
Smaller text elements that use the muted text color appear in silver instead of red

file_operations.description: Change the --text-muted CSS custom property from its current red color value to a silver/gray color value in both the light theme (root selector) and dark theme (.dark selector). Use OKLCH color values consistent with the existing color system, selecting an appropriate lightness and chroma to create a neutral silver/gray tone that maintains readability for muted text elements.
